# Task 6 implementation for virtual file system (2026-03-13 05:29Z)

_**User**_

Implement Task 6 from docs/plans/2026-03-13-dev-shell-impl-plan.md.

**Task 6: 虚拟 FS — 解析相对路径为绝对路径**

In src/vfs.rs, in impl Vfs, add:

/// 将任意路径（相对或绝对）归一化并解析为绝对路径字符串
pub fn resolve_to_absolute(&self, path: &str) -> String {
    let path = normalize_path(path);
    if path.starts_with('/') && path != "/" {
        return path;
    }
    if path == "/" {
        return self.cwd.clone();
    }
    let base = self.cwd.trim_end_matches('/');
    let p = path.trim_start_matches('/');
    normalize_path(&format!("{}/{}", base, p))
}

Note: normalize_path for relative path may not add leading /; the plan uses format!("{}/{}", base, p) then normalize_path so the result is absolute (starts with /). Ensure the final result always returns an absolute path (starting with /). Run cargo test. Commit: git add src/vfs.rs && git commit -m "feat(vfs): resolve_to_absolute for cwd-relative paths"

Work directory: /home/ars/richard/2026/pvm_2/dev_shell
Report: what added, test result, commit.
